nasb.text: and their relatives, heads of their fathers’ households, 1,760 very able men for the work of the service of the house of God.

esv.text: besides their kinsmen, heads of their fathers’ houses, 1,760, mighty men for the work of the service of the house of God.

cnv.text: 以及他們的眾親族，他們家族的首領，共有一千七百六十人，都是有才幹，很會作神殿裡工作的人。

ccb.text: 回来的祭司共一千七百六十人，全是族长，善于办理上帝殿的事务。
